mapper.sql: select id, user_id, seat_id, status, reservation_status, reservation_in_time, reservation_out_time, sign_in_time, sign_out_time, remark, audit_status, carpool_group_id, share_code from room_reservation
mapper.select: where reservation_status = '已预约' and sign_in_time is null and reservation_in_time is not null and (audit_status is null or audit_status in ('无需审核', '已通过')) and timestampdiff(MINUTE, reservation_in_time, now()) >= #{minutes}

where reservation_status = '使用中' and sign_out_time is null and reservation_out_time is not null and (audit_status is null or audit_status in ('无需审核', '已通过')) and timestampdiff(MINUTE, reservation_out_time, now()) >= #{minutes}
select distinct seat_id from room_reservation where carpool_group_id = #{groupId} and reservation_status in ('已预约','使用中') and (audit_status is null or audit_status in ('无需审核','待审核','已通过'))

where reservation_status = '已预约' and sign_in_time is null and reservation_in_time > now() and reservation_in_time <= date_add(now(), interval #{minutes} minute) and (audit_status is null or audit_status in ('无需审核','已通过')) and not exists ( select 1 from room_app_reminder ar where ar.reservation_id = room_reservation.id and ar.title = '预约即将开始' )
mapper.insert:
insert into room_reservation
user_id, seat_id, status, reservation_status, reservation_in_time, reservation_out_time, sign_in_time, sign_out_time, remark, audit_status, carpool_group_id, share_code,
#{userId}, #{seatId}, #{status}, #{reservationStatus}, #{reservationInTime}, #{reservationOutTime}, #{signInTime}, #{signOutTime}, #{remark}, #{auditStatus}, #{carpoolGroupId}, #{shareCode},
mapper.delete:
delete from room_reservation where id in
#{id}
